buildTarget.description: Angular build target to run before deploying (e.g. "my-app:build:production"). If null, outputPath must be set.

outputPath.description: Folder to sync. Defaults to the build target's output + /browser.

storageRegion.description: Primary region of the Storage Zone (must match where the zone was created).

pullZoneId.description: Numeric Pull Zone ID to purge after upload. Required when purgeAfterUpload is true.

purgeAfterUpload.description: Purge the Pull Zone cache after a successful sync.

concurrency.description: Maximum number of parallel uploads and deletes.

retries.description: Times to retry a failed upload, delete, list, or purge, with exponential backoff. 0 disables retries.

ignore.description: Glob patterns (relative to the output folder) to exclude from the sync. Supports **, *, and literals.

dryRun.description: Compute and print the diff without uploading, deleting, or purging.
